name: Josiel Manzonni
greeting: >_ Exceptional Software Engineer • Backend & Mobile Architect
headline: Building scalable software across backend platforms, mobile experiences and digital payments.
description: I'm Josiel Manzonni, a software engineer with 14+ years of experience designing and delivering backend systems, Android applications and cloud-native platforms. My work combines deep expertise in distributed systems, mobile architecture, payment platforms, security and technical leadership. I've contributed to products and platforms at Samsung Research (SiDi), Motorola Mobility (Eldorado) and Pinterest, helping teams build reliable experiences used by millions of users.
